domain: Mobile Web Super App (Transportation, Food, Logistics, E-commerce, Payments)

primary.description: Vibrant Royal Blue for main brand CTA and trust.

background.description: Warm zinc for light mode, deep zinc for dark mode.

surface.description: Pure white for cards in light mode to contrast with background.

rules.headings: Tracking-tight for all headings. Use font-semibold or font-bold.
rules.body: Leading-relaxed for better readability on mobile.
rules.sizing: H1 max text-4xl on mobile. H2 text-2xl. Use fluid scaling for larger screens if necessary, though this is a mobile-first UI.

spacing_and_layout.mobile_container: Use max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-background relative shadow-2xl for the main app container to simulate a mobile app on desktop browsers.
spacing_and_layout.admin_container: Full width layout grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-5. Sidebar takes 1 col, main content takes 4.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Use p-4 to p-6 inside cards. Use gap-4 or gap-6 for grids.
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: Use a bento-style grid for the 6 services on the home screen. grid-cols-4. Cakride and Cakcar span 2 cols, others span 1 col, or all span 1 col in a 3-col grid.

surfaces.cards: Neumorphism-lite (Tactile). Mix soft ambient shadows with sharp inner contrast. Classes: bg-white dark:bg-zinc-900 shadow-sm border border-black/5 dark:border-white/10 rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl.
surfaces.bottom_nav: Crystal Glassmorphism. Classes: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 dark:bg-zinc-900/80 border-t border-black/5 dark:border-white/10 pb-safe pt-2 px-4 z-50.
surfaces.buttons: Fully rounded (rounded-full) for primary actions to reinforce the friendly, vibrant play archetype.

components.language_toggle: Place in the Account/Profile section or top header. Use Shadcn DropdownMenu or a custom segmented control.
components.dark_mode_toggle: Place in the Account/Profile section or top header. Switch between light and dark themes using next-themes or native Tailwind dark mode.
components.whatsapp_integration: For ordering, use a button that links to `https://wa.me/{admin_number}?text={encoded_order_details}`.
components.admin_charts: Use Shadcn charts (Recharts) for Daily and Monthly reports.
components.service_icons: Use lucide-react. Bike (Cakride), Car (Cakcar), Pizza/Utensils (Cakfood), Package (Caksend), ShoppingBag (Cakmart), Wallet (Cakpay).

animation_and_motion.interactions: Hover states on all cards (scale up 1% or translate-y-1, deepen shadow). Active states scale down slightly.
animation_and_motion.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion for sliding in service detail pages from the right, or bottom sheets sliding up.

food_placeholder_1.description: Nasi Goreng for Cakfood menu item.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='cakride-service-card', data-testid='order-whatsapp-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the app feels like a native mobile app. Constrain the main user view to max-w-md mx-auto with a shadow on desktop, but allow it to be full width on mobile.
Implement a persistent bottom navigation bar for the user app (Home, Orders, Account).
Admin dashboard should be a separate route (e.g., /admin) and should use a standard desktop-friendly layout (sidebar + main content).
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Select, Dialog, Tabs) but strip Vercel-like styling to match the tactile, friendly vibe.
Implement language toggle (ID/EN) using a simple context or state, affecting main UI strings.
Ensure the WhatsApp order flow formats the message nicely: 'Halo Admin, saya ingin pesan layanan [Nama Layanan]. Detail: ...'.
Avoid using raw tags without alt text. Add rounded corners (rounded-xl) to images.
For the admin charts, use recharts via Shadcn UI's chart component.
Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'DM Sans' for body text. Add these to Tailwind config and import them.
